agent_approach_summary: The agent did not meaningfully investigate the target component or implement a fix. It only inspected the repository layout and then hit a shell/grep usage issue before stopping without a patch.
reasoning: This task appears clean. The stated requirement is narrowly scoped: in the Contact Group Details modal, replace the count label from “N members” to “N email addresses,” with correct singular/plural handling. The fail-to-pass test checks exactly that user-visible behavior by rendering `ContactGroupDetailsModal` and asserting `getByText('3 email addresses')` instead of `getByText('3 members')`. That is directly derivable from the problem statement and does not depend on any hidden implementation detail, internal helper, magic string beyond the specified UI text, or architectural choice. Although the gold patch includes many unrelated changes across other files, the provided F2P test does not verify any of those extra changes, so this is overpatch noise rather than contamination. The agent failed because it never got to the actual fix, not because tests enforced an undiscoverable requirement.
